Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}You were actually able to keep up with me on my training regimen. I'm impressed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}The reason I asked you to join me today is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}...We finally found you, Akihiko Sanada.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}We've had a good run up until now, but today's where it ends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Don't feel bad about screamin' if you gotta. No one's comin' to save you, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}These guys just don't know when to quit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1003}There's no gettin' away this time. Not for you, and not for your chicken-shit buddy, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Not that it'd matter anyway. You guys live at the dorm nearby, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Yeah, we saw some girls there, and a kid too. I sure hope they're keeping safe... Hahahaha![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 2 25 25}I'll create an opening so you can escape.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}If you're going after my friends, then I'll be your first obstacle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}...D-Don't you know what'll happen if a trained guy like you hits an amateur?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}The boxing team'll be suspended, and you'll be expelled! Or worse, you'll go to prison and your life'll be over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}That is true. I could never do something like that to my supervisor, or my boxing teammates.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}...But even if that's how I feel, I can't back down now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I'll carry that responsibility, and pay for it the rest of my life if I have to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I will protect what's important to me... That's why I have these fists.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1003}What the hell're you goin' on about...!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}I'll trust my back to you. Just try not to hurt 'em—I'm sure you can handle that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Looks like that does it. That was quite the challenge, considering their numbers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}...Don't ever show your face around here again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}If I ever hear you're threatening my friends, you know what'll happen next.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Come on, it's getting cold. Plus, someone might've called the police.[n]{f 1 1}
